name: darwin-strategy-foundry
title: Darwin — Evolutionary Strategy Foundry
description: Evolves a population of backtestable crypto trading strategies from CoinMarketCap data and returns an out-of-sample-validated champion spec. Track 2 (Strategy Skills): generates a backtestable spec, not a live agent.
author: Darwin

consumes.notes: Uses CoinMarketCap OHLCV + Fear & Greed; derives market momentum and breadth regime signals.

tools.name: evolve_strategy
tools.description: Evolve a champion strategy from CMC data with train/validation/held-out-test scoring.

tools.name: backtest_spec
tools.description: Backtest a StrategySpec on CMC data; deterministic, lookahead-free, fees + slippage.

tools.name: spec_schema
tools.description: Return the StrategySpec DSL guide (valid indicators, signals, conditions, risk).
